/simple.helpText:
Simple/Budget routing — Routes to Gemini 2.5 Flash for fast, cheap responses. Best for quick facts, casual chat, and follow-ups.
Usage: /simple <your message>

/cheap.helpText:
Budget routing — Alias for /simple. Routes to Gemini 2.5 Flash.
Usage: /cheap <your message>

/coding.helpText:
Code routing — Routes to Claude Sonnet 4.6 for writing code, debugging, refactoring, and code review.
Usage: /coding <your message>

/creative.helpText:
Creative routing — Routes to Claude Sonnet 4.6 for writing content, emails, blog posts, and translation.
Usage: /creative <your message>

/action.helpText:
Action routing — Routes to Claude Sonnet 4.6 for tool calls, file operations, and system commands.
Usage: /action <your message>

/reason.helpText:
Reasoning routing — Routes to Gemini 2.5 Pro for deep analysis, architecture decisions, and complex reasoning.
Usage: /reason <your message>

/best.helpText:
Best model routing — Alias for /reason. Routes to Gemini 2.5 Pro, the frontier reasoning model.
Usage: /best <your message>

simple.description: Quick facts, follow-ups, casual chat, acknowledgments, short summaries

coding.description: Writing code, debugging errors, building features, refactoring, code review

reasoning.description: Multi-step analysis, architecture decisions, trade-off evaluation, system design

creative.description: Writing content, drafting emails, blog posts, marketing copy, translation

action.description: Tool calls, system commands, file operations, data queries, deployments
